testcase.name: tc09_CourseCardsDisplayed

failure.message: FAIL TC-09: No course cards found. Try inspecting page and updating selectors. expected [false] but found [true]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: FAIL TC-09: No course cards found. testcase.name: tc17_ScrollThroughFullPage

error.message: class java.lang.Double cannot be cast to class java.lang.Long (java.lang.Double and java.lang.Long are in module java.base of loader 'bootstrap')

testcase.error: java.lang.ClassCastException: class java.lang.Double cannot be cast to class java.lang.Long (java.lang.Double and java.lang.Long are in module java.base of loader 'bootstrap') at com.vellinfotech.test.HomeToCoursesPageTest.tc17_ScrollThroughFullPage(HomeToCoursesPageTest.java:790) at testcase.name: tc20_ClickFirstCourseCard

testcase.name: tc21_NavigateBackToCoursesPage
